searches.topic: MCU 固件生成与自动烧录流程(跨 ESP32/STM32/nRF)
searches.venues: RTSS, ASP-DAC, USENIX Security, NDSS, MILCOM, SECON, ISLPED, SenSys, arXiv

searches.topic: PCB硬件自动化流程(面向 IoT传感器板)
searches.venues: UIST, arXiv, board-level EDA / schematic automation

papers.title: Polymorphic Blocks: Unifying High-level Specification and Low-level Control for Circuit Board Design
papers.summary_en: This UIST paper proposes a block-based circuit board design workflow that lets users move between reusable functional blocks and low-level electrical editing without losing consistency. The key idea is to make board design more compositional, so designers can assemble sensor, power, and compute modules instead of redrawing every net from scratch. For IoT sensor boards, that matters because most products are variants of a few recurring motifs: MCU, radio, battery charging, sensors, and connectors. The paper is important as a human-computer interaction view of hardware automation: it does not fully auto-generate a manufacturable PCB, but it shows how higher-level design intent can be preserved through to board implementation.
papers.summary_zh: 这篇 UIST 论文提出了一种面向电路板设计的模块化工作流，让设计者可以在高层功能块和低层电气编辑之间来回切换，同时保持连接关系一致。它的核心思想是把常见的传感器、电源、计算与接口模块封装成可组合的设计单元，而不是每次都从头画原理图。对 IoT 传感器板来说，这一点很关键，因为大量项目本质上只是 MCU、无线、供电和若干传感器的不同组合。它虽然还没有做到“输入需求后自动输出可投产 PCB”，但清楚展示了从设计意图到板级实现之间可以被自动化承接的那一层。
papers.topic: PCB硬件自动化流程(面向 IoT传感器板)

papers.title: Hierarchical Automatic Power Plane Generation with Genetic Optimization and Multilayer Perceptron
papers.summary_en: This work focuses on one of the hardest subproblems in PCB automation: power plane generation under electrical and geometric constraints. The method combines a genetic optimizer with a multilayer perceptron to search layouts that minimize disconnected islands and improve manufacturable power distribution. For IoT boards, the contribution is narrower than full-board synthesis, but strategically important because power integrity is one of the reasons end-to-end automation usually breaks down. It shows that practical automation is likely to emerge first as a pipeline of specialized solvers, not as one monolithic text-to-PCB model.
papers.summary_zh: 这项工作聚焦于 PCB 自动化里非常关键、也最难完全自动处理的子问题之一：在电气和几何约束下自动生成 power plane。作者把遗传优化与多层感知机结合起来，目标是减少孤岛、提升供电平面的可制造性与质量。对 IoT 板卡来说，它解决的不是整板自动生成，而是完整流程中的关键瓶颈，因为供电完整性往往决定自动化布局能否真正落地。它也说明一个现实判断：PCB 自动化更可能先由多个专用求解器串起来，而不是一步到位的单模型文本到 PCB。
papers.topic: PCB硬件自动化流程(面向 IoT传感器板)

papers.title: PCBSchemaGen: Constraint-Guided Schematic Design via LLM for Printed Circuit Boards (PCB)
papers.summary_en: PCBSchemaGen is one of the clearest recent attempts to go from requirements to board-level schematic structure with an LLM in the loop. The system does not trust raw text generation alone; it adds datasheet-grounded constraints, pin-role semantics, and verification against a knowledge graph extracted from real components. That architecture matters because requirement-to-PCB automation fails mostly on pin correctness, supply rails, and package-level details rather than on high-level reasoning. The paper strongly supports the view that a realistic autonomous PCB flow must be retrieval-augmented, constraint-checked, and component-aware from the beginning.
papers.summary_zh: PCBSchemaGen 是近两年里最接近“从需求走向板级原理图”的工作之一。它并不是简单让 LLM 直接生成电路，而是在生成过程中引入 datasheet 约束、pin role 语义以及基于器件知识图谱的验证机制。这个系统设计很关键，因为真实的需求到 PCB 自动化，最容易失败的不是高层推理，而是引脚映射、电源轨、封装和器件约束这些细节。它很有力地说明，真正可用的自动化 PCB 流程必须从一开始就是检索增强、约束驱动、并且对元器件细节敏感的。
papers.topic: PCB硬件自动化流程(面向 IoT传感器板)

papers.title: CircuitLM: A Multi-Agent LLM-Aided Design Framework for Generating Circuit Schematics from Natural Language Prompts
papers.authors: Khandakar Shakib Al Hasan et al.
papers.summary_en: CircuitLM frames natural-language-to-schematic generation as a multi-agent workflow rather than a single-pass LLM completion. It splits the problem into component identification, pin retrieval, reasoning, structured JSON synthesis, and final rendering, which is much closer to how a robust EDA agent would need to operate. For IoT sensor boards, that staged design is especially relevant because requirements often mix analog, digital, power, and interface concerns in the same prompt. The paper is useful not because it proves full PCB autonomy is solved, but because it outlines a plausible architecture for turning user requirements into machine-checkable circuit artifacts.
papers.summary_zh: CircuitLM 把“自然语言到原理图”的问题建模成多智能体流水线，而不是单次 LLM 补全。它把任务拆成器件识别、引脚检索、专家推理、结构化 JSON 合成以及最终可视化渲染，这比单纯文本生成更接近真实可用的 EDA agent。对 IoT 传感器板来说，这种分阶段结构尤其重要，因为用户需求往往同时包含模拟、数字、电源和接口约束。它的价值不在于已经解决完整 PCB 自主设计，而在于给出了把用户需求稳定转成可验证电路工件的一条合理架构。
papers.topic: PCB硬件自动化流程(面向 IoT传感器板)

papers.title: TypedSchematics: A Block-based PCB Design Tool with Real-time Detection of Common Connection Errors
papers.summary_en: TypedSchematics argues that PCB design reuse should look more like software reuse, with typed blocks that can be safely composed and checked in real time. Its contribution is not only automated composition, but a type-like language that catches invalid merges between circuit blocks before they become board-level failures. For the IoT use case, this is highly relevant because many boards are assembled from recurring sensing, power, and communication motifs by non-experts or mixed-skill teams. The paper suggests that requirement-driven PCB automation may become practical sooner if the system works over reusable typed blocks instead of synthesizing every design from zero.
papers.summary_zh: TypedSchematics 的核心观点是，PCB 复用应该更像软件复用：设计者不只是复制粘贴原理图片段，而是使用带类型约束的功能块进行安全组合。它不仅支持自动拼接，还通过类似类型系统的机制在实时阶段捕获连接错误，避免错误一路传到板级实现。对于 IoT 场景，这非常契合，因为很多传感板其实都是由供电、传感、通信和 MCU 这些重复模块构成。它提示了一条更现实的路线：需求驱动的 PCB 自动化，可能先建立在“有约束的模块组合”上，而不是对每块板子都从零综合。
papers.topic: PCB硬件自动化流程(面向 IoT传感器板)

papers.title: HWE-Bench: Can Language Models Perform Board-level Schematic Designs?
papers.summary_en: HWE-Bench is less a synthesis method than a reality check for autonomous electronics design. It builds a benchmark of 300 board-level design tasks with real datasheets and shows that current models still fail badly when physical intuition and datasheet grounding matter. That makes it one of the most useful papers for your question about fully automatic PCB generation from requirements: it quantifies how far current models are from reliably producing board-ready schematics. The main takeaway is that end-to-end automation is promising, but still bottlenecked by component-level grounding and engineering verification.
papers.summary_zh: HWE-Bench 更像是对“自动电子设计 agent”现状的一次基准审判，而不是新的综合算法。它构建了 300 个真实板级设计任务，并结合 datasheet 知识库来评估模型到底能不能把需求转成有效原理图；结果显示，当前模型在涉及物理直觉和器件细节时仍然表现很弱。对你最关心的“能否输入需求后直接生成完整 PCB 文件”这个问题，它的意义非常直接：它定量说明了现阶段离稳定可用还有多远。最关键的结论是，端到端自动化已经有苗头，但还被器件约束理解和工程验证能力卡住。
papers.topic: PCB硬件自动化流程(面向 IoT传感器板)

papers.title: AutoEmbed: Towards Automated Software Development for Generic Embedded IoT Systems via LLMs
papers.summary_en: AutoEmbed is directly aligned with the question of whether a generic embedded IoT requirement can be turned into working firmware with LLMs. The system is described as a four-stage pipeline covering library solving, knowledge generation, prompt assembly, and LLM-driven code synthesis, which means it is not just asking a model to emit code from a blank prompt. That architecture matters because the hard part in ESP32, STM32, and nRF automation is selecting the right hardware-specific libraries and assembling enough grounded context before generation starts. As a SenSys 2026 paper, it is one of the clearest recent signals that requirement-to-firmware automation for embedded IoT has moved from scattered demos into serious systems research.
papers.summary_zh: AutoEmbed 与你关心的问题几乎是正面对齐的：能不能把通用嵌入式 IoT 需求自动变成可工作的固件。公开页面给出的系统结构是四阶段流水线，依次包含 library solving、knowledge generation、prompt assembly 和 LLM-driven code synthesis，也就是说它并不是让模型对着空 prompt 直接裸写代码。这个架构很关键，因为在 ESP32、STM32、nRF 这类平台上，真正困难的部分往往是先选对硬件相关库、再把足够扎实的上下文喂给生成器，而不是最后几步代码输出本身。作为 SenSys 2026 的论文，它是目前最直接的证据之一，说明“需求到固件”的自动化已经从零散 demo 进入到较严肃的系统研究阶段。
papers.topic: MCU 固件生成与自动烧录流程(跨 ESP32/STM32/nRF)

papers.title: Platform-Specific Code Generation from Platform-Independent Timed Models
papers.summary_en: This paper studies how to compile platform-independent timed models into platform-specific embedded code while preserving timing semantics. Its significance for modern MCU automation is that it formalizes the boundary between application intent and board-specific implementation, which is exactly the boundary a firmware agent has to cross when targeting ESP32, STM32, or nRF devices. Rather than treating firmware generation as free-form coding, the paper treats it as constrained synthesis against timing models and deployment assumptions. That perspective remains useful for any requirement-to-firmware pipeline that needs deterministic behavior instead of approximate code generation.
papers.summary_zh: 这篇论文研究如何把平台无关的时序模型编译成平台相关的嵌入式代码，同时尽量保持原始时序语义不被破坏。它对今天的 MCU 自动化仍然重要，因为它非常清楚地定义了“应用意图”和“板级实现”之间的那条边界，而这正是面向 ESP32、STM32、nRF 的固件 agent 必须跨过去的地方。论文并没有把固件生成当成自由写代码，而是把它视为受时序模型和部署约束驱动的综合问题。对于任何追求确定性而不是随意生成代码的自动化固件流程，这个视角仍然很有价值。
papers.topic: MCU 固件生成与自动烧录流程(跨 ESP32/STM32/nRF)

papers.title: Automatic generation of hardware dependent software for MPSoCs from abstract system specifications
papers.summary_en: This ASP-DAC paper is an early but still relevant example of generating hardware-dependent software from abstract specifications. The important engineering lesson is that code generation becomes tractable once the hardware contract and communication structure are expressed in a formal intermediate representation. That maps well to today’s cross-chip MCU problem, where the hard part is not emitting C code, but carrying pin, bus, and peripheral assumptions across families. It supports the idea that automatic firmware generation should be built around structured device models rather than purely prompt-driven code completion.
papers.summary_zh: 这篇 ASP-DAC 论文是较早但仍然很有参考价值的例子：从抽象系统规格自动生成依赖硬件的软件。它给出的核心工程启发是，一旦硬件契约和通信结构被放进形式化中间表示，代码生成就会变得可控。这个结论与今天跨 ESP32、STM32、nRF 的 MCU 自动适配问题高度一致，因为真正困难的不是输出 C 代码，而是如何把引脚、总线和外设假设稳定地带过不同芯片族。它支持这样一种路线：自动固件生成应该建立在结构化设备模型之上，而不是单纯依赖 prompt 驱动的代码补全。
papers.topic: MCU 固件生成与自动烧录流程(跨 ESP32/STM32/nRF)

papers.title: RapidPatch: Firmware Hotpatching for Real-Time Embedded Devices
papers.summary_en: RapidPatch tackles a production-facing firmware problem: how to update real-time embedded code without rebooting the device or violating timing guarantees. That matters here because automated firmware generation is only half the story; the generated image must also be safely delivered, patched, and maintained on deployed devices. The paper moves the discussion from one-shot flashing toward fine-grained lifecycle management, which is much closer to how industrial MCU fleets operate. For cross-platform automation, it highlights that deployment constraints can be as important as code synthesis itself.
papers.summary_zh: RapidPatch 关注的是量产环境里真正棘手的问题：如何在不重启设备、也不破坏实时性的前提下更新嵌入式固件。它之所以与本题相关，是因为“自动生成固件”只是前半段，后半段还包括如何把生成结果安全地下发、修补并维持在设备上。论文把讨论重点从一次性刷写推进到更细粒度的生命周期管理，这比单纯烧录更接近工业 MCU 设备的真实运维方式。对跨平台自动化来说，它提示我们：部署约束的重要性并不亚于代码综合本身。
papers.topic: MCU 固件生成与自动烧录流程(跨 ESP32/STM32/nRF)

papers.title: HERA: Hotpatching of Embedded Real-time Applications
papers.summary_en: HERA also studies live updating for embedded real-time software, but from the angle of preserving correctness under stringent timing and memory constraints. For MCU automation, this paper matters because an end-to-end pipeline is only believable if it can update running devices without destabilizing them. The work makes clear that automated deployment on small controllers is not simply a compiler problem; it is a systems problem involving memory layouts, patch compatibility, and execution safety. That is directly relevant to any claim of autonomous flashing across multiple MCU families.
papers.summary_zh: HERA 同样研究嵌入式实时软件的在线更新，但更强调在严格的时序和内存约束下如何保持系统正确性。对 MCU 自动化来说，它的重要性在于：如果一条端到端自动流水线连在线设备的稳定更新都做不到，那它就谈不上真正可部署。论文说明，小型控制器上的自动化部署绝不只是编译问题，而是涉及内存布局、补丁兼容性和执行安全的一整套系统问题。这一点直接关系到“跨多类 MCU 自动烧录”是否真的可信。
papers.topic: MCU 固件生成与自动烧录流程(跨 ESP32/STM32/nRF)

papers.title: From Library Portability to Para-rehosting: Natively Executing Microcontroller Software on Commodity Hardware
papers.summary_en: This paper shows how MCU firmware can be rehosted on commodity hardware by neutralizing hardware dependencies. The immediate relevance is to automated firmware generation loops: if you can run generated firmware off-target, you can validate and debug it before touching a real ESP32, STM32, or nRF board. That shortens the iteration cycle and makes autonomous code generation much more realistic. In practice, rehosting is one of the strongest enablers for scaling firmware agents beyond toy examples.
papers.summary_zh: 这篇论文展示了如何通过移除或适配硬件依赖，让 MCU 固件在通用硬件上运行。它对自动化固件生成特别重要，因为一旦能在离板环境里先运行和调试生成结果，就能在真正接触 ESP32、STM32、nRF 硬件之前完成大量验证。这样会显著缩短自动生成代码的迭代闭环，也让 agent 式固件生成更接近可用工程系统。现实里，rehosting 是把固件自动化从玩具 demo 推向可扩展实践的重要支撑能力。
papers.topic: MCU 固件生成与自动烧录流程(跨 ESP32/STM32/nRF)

papers.title: SOTA: Secure Over-The-Air Programming of IoT Devices
papers.summary_en: SOTA studies secure OTA programming for IoT devices, emphasizing authenticated updates and safe deployment rather than only flash mechanics. This is directly relevant if you want a requirement-to-code-to-flash pipeline that scales beyond a USB cable on a lab bench. The paper frames firmware delivery as a trust and recovery problem, which is exactly what cross-device automation needs once multiple boards are deployed in the field. It is a reminder that automation without secure update infrastructure is incomplete.
papers.summary_zh: SOTA 研究的是 IoT 设备的安全 OTA 编程，它关心的重点不是单纯如何把二进制写进 Flash，而是如何保证更新认证、完整性和故障恢复。对“需求到代码再到烧录”的自动化闭环来说，这一点非常关键，因为真正有价值的流程不能只在实验台上通过串口刷写，而要能面向实际部署环境。论文把固件交付视为信任链和恢复机制问题，这正是跨设备自动化最终必须补上的部分。它提醒我们，没有安全更新基础设施的自动化，本质上是不完整的。
papers.topic: MCU 固件生成与自动烧录流程(跨 ESP32/STM32/nRF)

papers.title: Remote progressive firmware update for flash-based networked embedded systems
papers.summary_en: This paper presents progressive firmware update for flash-based embedded systems, reducing the burden of replacing whole images on constrained devices. Its relevance today is that many cross-MCU automation claims ignore the cost of bandwidth, energy, and flash wear when deploying generated images. By treating update as an incremental systems problem, the paper gives a more realistic model for field deployment. That is particularly useful for battery-powered IoT nodes where full reflashing is often the wrong operational primitive.
papers.summary_zh: 这篇论文提出面向 Flash 型嵌入式系统的渐进式远程固件更新方法，目的是降低受限设备整包替换的代价。它今天依然相关，因为很多“自动化烧录”方案只关注代码生成，却忽略了带宽、能耗和 Flash 磨损这些现实部署成本。论文把更新问题建模成增量式系统问题，而不是一次性整体重刷，这更接近 IoT 节点的实际运行条件。对于电池供电的小设备来说，这种思路尤其重要。
papers.topic: MCU 固件生成与自动烧录流程(跨 ESP32/STM32/nRF)

papers.title: No-reboot and zero-flash over-the-air programming for Wireless Sensor Networks
papers.summary_en: This paper targets extremely constrained wireless sensor nodes and proposes OTA updating without reboot and without extra flash reservation. That is a strong fit for your question because it exposes the operational limits that any automatic code-and-flash pipeline must handle on small MCUs. The main lesson is that update automation is dominated by memory layout, availability, and runtime continuity, not only by compiler support. In other words, the last mile of automated flashing is mostly systems engineering.
papers.summary_zh: 这篇论文面向极度受限的无线传感节点，提出了无需重启、也不依赖额外 Flash 空间的 OTA 更新方案。它与您的问题高度相关，因为它直接揭示了自动代码生成和自动烧录在小 MCU 上真正要面对的资源边界。论文传递出的核心信息是：更新自动化主要受内存布局、在线可用性和运行连续性支配，而不只是编译器或代码生成能力。换句话说，自动烧录的最后一公里，本质上是系统工程问题。
papers.topic: MCU 固件生成与自动烧录流程(跨 ESP32/STM32/nRF)

papers.title: AutoPatch: Automated Generation of Hotpatches for Real-Time Embedded Devices
papers.summary_en: AutoPatch pushes further toward automation by generating hotpatches for real-time embedded devices instead of requiring manual intervention for every fix. It is relevant because it narrows the gap between automatic code generation and automatic post-deployment maintenance. For heterogeneous MCU fleets, the difficult part is not just generating an initial firmware image, but generating safe deltas that respect timing and state continuity. This paper is one of the clearest signals that the firmware automation stack is moving from compile-time assistance toward runtime lifecycle automation.
papers.summary_zh: AutoPatch 更进一步，它尝试自动为实时嵌入式设备生成热补丁，而不是每次都依赖工程师手工修复。它的重要性在于把自动化从“初始代码生成”推进到了“部署后维护”阶段。对于异构 MCU 设备群来说，难点不仅在于生成首版固件，还在于如何生成既安全又不破坏时序和状态连续性的增量补丁。它是一个很明显的信号：固件自动化正在从编译期辅助走向运行期生命周期管理。
papers.topic: MCU 固件生成与自动烧录流程(跨 ESP32/STM32/nRF)
